sourceRefs: DRAFT — first C1 unit; C-level units centre on discourse techniques per C-CONTENT-MAP.md. Covers la synthèse de documents (the DALF C1 written task): the three iron laws (objectivity, confrontation, reformulation), the préparation/rédaction method, and the phrases-outils bank (traiter de, dégager la problématique, soulever, mettre en évidence, il ressort de…que, en guise de conclusion). Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego 5 C1>C2 (Hachette), Dossier 1 'Des machines et des hommes' ('Techniques pour faire une synthèse de documents oraux', p.23). Source PDF scanned; pages read visually. Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
